payload.context: SPE has ZERO delay under complete information; positive delay requires incomplete information

payload.context: portfolio share strongly proportional to seat contribution; among the most robust regularities in comparative politics

payload.context: Local Higgs train-split MLE of the linear form; this is a per-cascade nuisance rate, not a transportable constant.
payload.name: q (per-exposure transmission rate, linear hazard)

payload.context: The linear-in-exposure hazard was SIGNIFICANTLY WORSE than a concave/log-linear exposure response on Higgs held-out; simple contagion is retained only as a comparator, not the preferred predictor.
payload.name: linear-vs-concave held-out penalty (delta held-out loss)

payload.context: LOCAL NULL: alpha=0.75 < 1 means Higgs did NOT exhibit the alpha>1 complex-contagion (superlinear reinforcement) signature — the fitted shape was concave/saturating, consistent with simple diminishing returns, not reinforcement.
payload.name: Hill exponent alpha (Higgs fit)

payload.context: Local Higgs baseline log-hazard; per-cascade nuisance.
payload.name: Hill intercept theta0 (Higgs fit)

payload.context: Published-research prior for the external-influence coefficient; note SD approximately equals the mean (heavy-tailed, not a tight point).
payload.name: p (coefficient of innovation), meta-analytic mean

payload.context: Published-research prior for the internal word-of-mouth coefficient; SD ~0.35 is nearly as large as the mean 0.38 — wide, product/country-dependent.
payload.name: q (coefficient of imitation), meta-analytic mean

payload.context: Number of diffusion-model applications pooled.
payload.name: meta-analysis sample size
payload.uncertainty: approx (reported as 'more than 200 product innovations' across 15 studies)

payload.context: LOCAL FAILURE: Hawkes MAE 1098.9 WORSE than the Poisson baseline MAE 973.0 on the Higgs aggregate count forecast.
payload.name: held-out 24-72h count-forecast MAE, Hawkes

payload.context: The simpler Poisson beat Hawkes — the failure that quarantines this family.
payload.name: held-out 24-72h count-forecast MAE, Poisson baseline

payload.context: Near-critical (alpha->1): the fit sits at the edge of the explosive regime, explaining unstable extrapolation and the under-forecast (Hawkes total 7149 vs Poisson total 10144).
payload.name: fitted branching ratio alpha (Higgs)

payload.context: Local Higgs e-folding decay time; sits at the top of the search grid, so it is a lower bound on the true tau (identification weak upward).
payload.name: fitted decay time constant tau (Higgs)
payload.uncertainty: grid {6,12,24,48}h; best log-likelihood at 48h (grid boundary) — upper end not bracketed

payload.context: The aging term barely improves held-out Brier and the CI includes zero — MARGINAL local signal, not a clear win.
payload.name: aging improvement over no-aging (paired delta Brier, Higgs held-out)

payload.context: Platform-specific (Digg news); illustrates that the decay time scale is domain-dependent and NOT the same as the local Higgs 48h.
payload.name: novelty decay characteristic time (Digg)

payload.context: Weaker ties raise job transmission up to a point, then diminishing marginal returns to tie weakness.

payload.context: Measurement-dependent result; weak ties help most in more-digital industries, strong ties in less-digital industries.

payload.value: moderately weak ties (by mutual connections); weakest ties (by interaction intensity)

payload.context: Scale of the LinkedIn field experiments (descriptive, not an effect size).

payload.context: Adoption of a paid mobile service application on a global instant-messaging network; dynamic matched-sample vs naive estimation.

payload.context: Formal result: absent randomization or strong assumptions, influence cannot be separated from homophily/covariate causation.
payload.name: identifiability_of_influence_from_observational_ties
